MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - JOSELITO LAUDENCIA, TEL. NO. 238-7831, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of Joselito Laudencia is Denied without prejudice. Defendant has not carried his burden of showing a basis for the bank accounts to be exempt. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, NOT REPORTED. = (301/PJB)

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Martin Hoffman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank.
No appearance by defendant Joselito Laudencia, a/k/a Joselito Z. Laudencia.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 29, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, August 9, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, and against defendant Joselito Laudencia, a/k/a Joselito Z. Laudencia as follows:

Principal - $37,709.98.
Interest - $3,283.17.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $439.50.

Total - $41,432.65.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Set For Trial On Aug-09-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
